response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the way, sir, and I’ll show you the truth. The silver lining of this situation is that the stranger’s words may yet offer a lead. Wrap your head around the implications—this is no ordinary case, and every detail matters. The truth is out there, and it’s time to uncover it."
